text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The season of scorching heat is here,<n>announcing
the beginning of this<n>year's summer camp!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What is synonymous with summer?<n>The sun! And
what is synonymous<n>with the sun? The Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Thus, the summer is my season!This year will bring forth the OverlordNouveau!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We've only just started and Opera<n>O's already
lost me... I guess she has<n>something new up her
sleeve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Overlord Nouveau is, in other<n>words, a whole
new me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An all-powerful me, the target of<n>countless,
envious eyes...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall conquer them all en route to an
overwhelming victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is the Overlord Nouveau, for even<n>the Overlord
must evolve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, hehehe... This ocean, is it not<n>ideal for
acquiring more strength,<n>Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Swimming through rough waters and<n>sprinting
across the sand... The beach<n>presents an ideal
training<n>environment for building up strength.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The forces of nature themselves shall<n>grant me
new power. Yes, I can feel<n>it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Poseidon will rise from the waves,<n>bestowing
terrible power unto me!<n>Bwaahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...Apparently, she doesn't anticipate<n>putting in the
work herself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter the course of events, I shall<n>emerge as
a new being this summer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Something will happen. And if itdoesn't, then I will make it happen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So that I may become a lord who<n>gains victory
with ease, no matter<n>who or what pursues me!
